response_text:
ENTITY Customer
PK passport
ATTR passport : varchar : PK
ATTR customer_name : varchar
ATTR customer_surname : varchar
ENTITY Airline
PK airline_code
ATTR airline_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar
ENTITY Location
PK location_code
ATTR location_code : varchar : PK
ATTR city : varchar
ENTITY Airport
PK airport_code
ATTR airport_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR location_code : varchar : FK
REL Airport -> Location : 0..N -> 1 : FK=location_code
ENTITY Airplane
PK license_number
ATTR license_number : varchar : PK
ATTR airplane_model : varchar
ENTITY StatusType
PK status_code
ATTR status_code : varchar : PK
ATTR status : varchar
ENTITY Flight
PK flight_number, flight_date
ATTR flight_number : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_date : date : PK
ATTR airline_code : varchar : FK
ATTR airport_departure : varchar : FK
ATTR airport_arrival : varchar : FK
ATTR belt_number : varchar
ATTR license_number : varchar : FK
REL Flight -> Airline : 0..N -> 1 : FK=airline_code
REL Flight -> Airport : 0..N -> 1 : FK=airport_departure
REL Flight -> Airport : 0..N -> 1 : FK=airport_arrival
REL Flight -> Airplane : 0..N -> 1 : FK=license_number
ENTITY FlightStatus
PK flight_number, flight_date, status_date, status_hour
ATTR flight_number : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR flight_date : date : PK : FK
ATTR status_code : varchar : FK
ATTR status_date : date : PK
ATTR status_hour : time : PK
REL FlightStatus -> Flight : 0..N -> 1 : FK=flight_number,flight_date
REL FlightStatus -> StatusType : 0..N -> 1 : FK=status_code
ENTITY PassengerFlight
PK passport, flight_number, flight_date
ATTR passport : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR flight_number : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR flight_date : date : PK : FK
ATTR seat_number : varchar
REL PassengerFlight -> Customer : 0..N -> 1 : FK=passport
REL PassengerFlight -> Flight : 0..N -> 1 : FK=flight_number,flight_date
ENTITY CrewMember
PK crew_license
ATTR crew_license : varchar : PK
ATTR crew_role : varchar
ENTITY CrewFlight
PK crew_license, flight_number, flight_date
ATTR crew_license : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR flight_number : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR flight_date : date : PK : FK
REL CrewFlight -> CrewMember : 0..N -> 1 : FK=crew_license
REL CrewFlight -> Flight : 0..N -> 1 : FK=flight_number,flight_date
